fields.snoiraud\n\n 2015-08-08 09:22\n\ndevelop:
Yes, I can get this error. Il we try to solve this, the error is reported later.
I think the best way should be to have at least one plugin loaded even if the user want to hide all plugins.
In this case, what should be the best plugin ?

It should never happen for lambda users. Is it necessary to try to solve this ?
I think it will cost many hours to try to find a workaround for one thing which will never happen.
fields.sam888\n\n 2015-08-09 00:13\n\nadministr:
Should never happen but did :) Reporting these issues is all about making sure these things don't happen to the user.

In this case, what should be the best plugin ?

I suggest that the plugin manager alert the user when they try to hide that last plugin that they must have at least one active plugin, so the question of what should be the best plugin is left up to the user.

So no plugin is the answer as once plugins/addons are hidden they will still be shown in the plugin manger lists but with the "Status" column showing "hidden".

(BTW: I have already spent sometime trying to fix this, but with no success at the moment :( )

notes.text:
Yes, I can get this error. Il we try to solve this, the error is reported later.
I think the best way should be to have at least one plugin loaded even if the user want to hide all plugins.
In this case, what should be the best plugin ?

It should never happen for lambda users. Is it necessary to try to solve this ?
I think it will cost many hours to try to find a workaround for one thing which will never happen.

Should never happen but did :) Reporting these issues is all about making sure these things don't happen to the user.

In this case, what should be the best plugin ?

I suggest that the plugin manager alert the user when they try to hide that last plugin that they must have at least one active plugin, so the question of what should be the best plugin is left up to the user.

So no plugin is the answer as once plugins/addons are hidden they will still be shown in the plugin manger lists but with the "Status" column showing "hidden".

(BTW: I have already spent sometime trying to fix this, but with no success at the moment :( )

Confirmed in Gramps 5.2.3 I followed your Steps To Reproduce and get
